Title: Stillman, Damie
Overview: Editor-in-Chief, Buildings US. BS from Northwestern University (1954), MA from University of Delaware (1956), PhD from Columbia University (1961). Professor, University of Delaware (Department Chairman, 1981-1986, 1993-)
Selected Bibliography: The Decorative Work of Robert Adam. New York: Transatlantic Arts, 1966. English Neo-Classical Architecture. London: A. Zwemmer, 1988.
